name: Monosodium Glutamate
details: Not permitted in foods for infants < 12 months.

name: Tartrazine
details: Mandatory warning: May have an adverse effect on activity and attention in children.

name: Sodium Benzoate
details: Often misused in milk/juice. Check for benzene formation with Vitamin C.

name: Sunset Yellow FCF
details: Restricted in E.U. and specific Indian dairy categories.

name: Sodium Nitrite
details: Strictly monitored in processed meats. Carcinogenic at high temp.

name: Acesulfame Potassium
details: Artificial sweetener. Not for young children.
